Video.summary: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of Robot Wars, The Second Wars.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 1

Video.summary: Philippa goes behind the scenes to find out how the shows fighting machines are made, whilst uncovering the trials and tribulations of their frantic creators.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 2

Video.summary: Another visit behind the scenes of Robot Wars Series 2, more exclusive footage and access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of this week’s competitors.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 3

Video.summary: Witness hope, triumph, desperation and defeat as Philippa takes us back to the pits, where competitors make final touches to their Robots, hoping they come back in one piece.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 4

Video.summary: Get a glimpse of how the production team setup the arena for contests such as jousting and pinball. Gain an insight as to how competitors construct their robots from team video diaries.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 5

Video.summary: More behind the scenes of the hit series Robot Wars. Philippa gets into the nitty gritty of why competitors choose to compete.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 6

Video.summary: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of Robot Wars, see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 7

Video.summary: See what happens when little kids become big kids, and toy trains are replaced by chainsaws. Watch the teams as they lock themselves in their workshops, creating killing machines.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 8

Video.summary: Delving behind the trenches of Robot Wars, digging for dirt in the competitors own video diaries.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 9

Video.summary: A unique, undercover look at Robot Wars Series 2. Featuring exclusive footage from the teams and highlights from the battles.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 10

Video.summary: Witness the human drama of competitor’s desperation for victory and the resulting mechanical carnage.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 11

Video.summary: Follow the exploits of teams all over the country as they battle it out in hopes of becoming champion.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 12

Video.summary: The pace steps up a gear as Philippa investigates behind the scenes of the series’ first Semi-finals.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 13

Video.summary: The second round of semi-finals follows six more teams that have made it through the heats and are one step closer to Grand Final.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 14

Video.summary: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. See what it’s like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 15

Video.summary: Four robots from Germany, four robots from the UK. The competitors will fight their fellow compatriots for a chance to represent their country in a Germany against UK final, to decide which country has the most ferocious machine.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany

Image.alt: The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany
The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany
The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany

Video.summary: The first heat of the All-Stars Championship, this heat determines which two robots go through to All-stars grand-final. Veteran robots all enter the arena once again as they put their experience to the test against each other.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - All-Stars Heat A

Video.summary: Six more renowned robots fight their way through the heats to fight for a chance to be the All-Star champion. One competitor in particular strikes fear into the roster. The two winners of each heat face off for the title in the Grand Final.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - All Stars Heat B

Video.summary: The Extreme Series continues with the Annihilator; a knockout competition between six competitors, over the course of four rounds and a final, six will be reduced to one, the annihilator champion.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - Annihilator

Video.summary: Celebrities take to the arena, teaming up with veterans from the series and their robots. The celebrities must control the robots for at least 60 seconds before the professionals can take over.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Video.summary: A knockout tournament with children at the helm. Will the house robots go easy on the kids, or will they just be easy targets?
Video.title: Extreme 2 - Minor Meltdown

Video.summary: Sixteen robots make eight teams in this Tag Team Terror. With only one robot permitted to battle at a time, will the teams share responsibility or will one bite off more than they can chew?
Video.title: Extreme 2 - Tag Team Terror

Video.summary: The New Blood Heats consisted of two three-way melees and then head-to-head battles, the two winners of the latter would fight, and the remaining robot would be sent to the Grand Finals. The champions would gain automatic entry to The Seventh Wars.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - New Blood A

Video.summary: The New Blood heats continue as six more robots come to test their metal. One of the competitors takes a beating from the house robots, will it spell the end of their time in the competition?
Video.title: Extreme 2 - New Blood B

Video.summary: The arena welcomes six new combatants during the third round of the heats. One competitor that seemingly lacks a weapon, surprises the judges. The two new house robots both get a chance to attack.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - New Blood C

Video.summary: The Fourth and last heat to decide which robots will make it to the final. Refbot loses his patience and starts inflicting harm on the competitors.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - New Blood D

Video.summary: The Four winners of the heats face each other in two eliminators, a play-off and a final battle between the two remaining robots. Only the most ferocious robot will be able to call themselves, the New Blood Champions.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - New Blood Grand Final

Video.summary: A battle for one of the most prized robot wars possessions, the challenge belt. Challengers must defeat each other and take on the current holders, Tornado, if they are to claim it for themselves.
Video.title: Extreme 2 - Challenge Belt

Video.summary: Initially released on VHS and broadcast on TV a year later, the World Championship featured sixteen robots from eleven different countries. A straight knockout competition would decide which robot would be known as the World Champion.
Video.title: The Third Wars - First World Championship

Image.alt: The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship
The Third Wars - First World Championship

Video.summary: Four teams take part in the tag team terror tournament. Two teams comprised of two robots enter the arena at once. Only one robot is allowed to battle, only being able to switch with their team-mate by entering their team’s coloured zone.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
